purpose: Deterministically summarize frozen Atomic Claim support labels at Candidate level while preserving the Atomic support vector as the primary diagnostic representation.

primary_candidate_aggregation.name: multi_anchor_material_gate
rules_in_order: If any anchor Claim is unsupported, Candidate is unsupported.
Else if any anchor Claim is not_assessable, Candidate is not_assessable.
Else if any anchor Claim is partially_supported, Candidate is partially_supported.
Else if any material secondary Claim is partially_supported, unsupported, or not_assessable, Candidate is partially_supported.

secondary_sensitivity_analyses.name: strict_weakest_material_claim
secondary_sensitivity_analyses.purpose: Describe sensitivity to treating any material unsupported Claim as Candidate unsupported.

secondary_sensitivity_analyses.name: anchor_only
secondary_sensitivity_analyses.purpose: Describe the Candidate state implied only by anchor Claims.

precedence_notes: Unsupported anchor takes precedence over not_assessable, partially_supported, and supported anchors.
Not-assessable anchor takes precedence over partially_supported and supported anchors.
A non-anchor unsupported Claim does not make the whole Candidate unsupported under the primary policy; it makes the Candidate partially_supported when all anchors remain supported.
Sensitivity analyses must never replace or overwrite the frozen primary aggregation.

historical_relation.current_change: replace obsolete single-central cardinality with frozen multi-anchor structural roles
